content.text:
*[pauses, slightly caught off guard, then recovers with a smile]*

Oh, it's just — I mean, it's kind of absurd, right? Like at some point you have to laugh at yourself. Three times! The same thing! It's almost impressive.

*[waves a hand]*

But underneath it... I don't know, frustration, I guess. Like genuine frustration that I keep doing this to myself. Or — that this keeps *happening.* You know what I mean.
